Package neqsim.process.diagnostics.restart

Class RestartStep

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.diagnostics.restart.RestartStep
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class RestartStep extends Object implements Serializable
A single step in a restart sequence.

Each step describes one action to take during restart, including the target equipment, the action to perform, any preconditions that must be satisfied, and the recommended timing.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

  • Constructor Details

    • RestartStep

      public RestartStep(int sequenceNumber, String equipmentName, String action, String precondition, double recommendedDelaySeconds, RestartStep.Priority priority, String notes)
      Creates a restart step.
      Parameters:
      sequenceNumber - order in the restart sequence (1-based)
      equipmentName - target equipment name
      action - description of the action to take
      precondition - precondition that must be met before this step (may be null)
      recommendedDelaySeconds - recommended delay after the previous step completes
      priority - priority level
      notes - additional notes or warnings (may be null)

  • Method Details

      Gets the sequence number.
      Returns:
      1-based sequence number

      Returns:

      public double getRecommendedDelaySeconds()
      Gets the recommended delay in seconds after the previous step.
      Returns:
      delay in seconds

    • getPriority

      public RestartStep.Priority getPriority()
      Gets the priority level.
      Returns:
